protein_name: Plasma membrane-associated small GTPase which cycles between an active GTP-bound and an inactive GDP-bound state. Causes the formation of thin, actin-rich surface projections called filopodia. Functions cooperatively with CDC42 and Rac to generate additional structures, increasing the diversity of actin-based morphology. Belongs to the small GTPase superfamily. Rho family. 2 alternatively spliced human isoforms have been reported. Note: This description may include information from UniProtKB.
